design_philosophy.core_concept: Digital Kitchen Assistant that feels like a family heirloom cookbook.

primary.description: Burnt Orange - Used for main CTAs, 'Cook Now' buttons, and active states. Represents heat, spice, and appetite.

secondary.description: Basil Green - Used for 'Vegetarian' tags, success states, and fresh ingredient highlights.

background.description: Warm Stone/Eggshell - Avoids clinical white. Creates a paper-like feel.

accent.description: Warm Gray - Used for secondary buttons and card backgrounds.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to mimic paper texture.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle top-down fades in Hero sections: 'bg-gradient-to-b from-orange-50/50 to-transparent'.

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom bar with iconic navigation.
navigation.desktop: Clean top navbar with 'Playfair' logo on left.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-orange-100 text-orange-700 rounded-full px-6 hover:bg-orange-50

cards.recipe: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-card hover:shadow-floating transition-shadow duration-300 group cursor-pointer
cards.pantry_item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm

inputs.search: bg-white border-none shadow-inner rounded-full py-6 pl-12 text-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-200

images.style: High contrast, top-down food photography. Rounded corners on all images.

hero_background.alt: Colorful Indian spices on white plate

component_mappings.PantryList: Custom component using Shadcn 'ScrollArea'. Items are swipeable rows.
component_mappings.RecipeCard: Custom component. Image height: 200px (mobile) / 250px (desktop). Content overlay on bottom gradient.
component_mappings.UploadZone: Dashed border area with 'Camera' icon. Uses 'react-dropzone' logic but styled as a placemat.
component_mappings.FamilyProfile: Avatar-based grid. Use Shadcn 'Avatar' with colored rings indicating spice tolerance (Green=Mild, Orange=Medium, Red=Hot).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #1c1917 or #292524.
Do NOT use standard blue for links. Use Orange-700.
Always add 'font-serif' to Headings (h1, h2, h3).
Buttons must be 'rounded-full' for a friendly, organic feel.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (e.g., 'Tomato added to pantry').
Animations: Use 'framer-motion' for entering items in the pantry list (staggerChildren).
Orange and Green theme is mandatory. Use them for semantic meaning (Orange=Action/Heat, Green=Veg/Freshness).
